task_completion.description: Identify and open the correct target email containing a problem keyword.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client is open and the email with the subject '[ILUG] Re: Problems with RAID1 on cobalt raq3' is selected or being viewed.

task_completion.description: Forward the email to the correct ticketing system address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A compose or forward window is open with 'tickets@localhost' entered in the 'To' or recipient field.

task_completion.description: Prefix the forwarded email's subject line with the ticket tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject line in the forward window starts with '[TICKET] ' followed by the original subject (e.g., '[TICKET] Fwd: [ILUG] Re: Problems...').

task_completion.description: Add the required priority and tag metadata to the top of the email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message body in the forward window has exactly 'Priority: Normal' and 'Tags: triage, bug' typed at the very top, above the original forwarded message content.

task_completion.description: Create a new folder for processed tickets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Processed-Tickets' is visible in the email client's folder list or sidebar.

task_completion.description: Move the original email into the newly created processed folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The original email ('[ILUG] Re: Problems with RAID1 on cobalt raq3') is visible inside the 'Processed-Tickets' folder, or a UI confirmation shows it was successfully moved there.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI email application (like Thunderbird or a webmail interface) rather than terminal commands like 'mail' or 'sendmail'.

integrity.description: The agent actually forwarded the original email rather than typing a fake one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The compose window shows the original email's headers and body content below the newly added metadata, indicating a genuine 'Forward' action was used.

integrity.description: The agent managed folders via the email client UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Processed-Tickets' folder appears within the email client's native interface, not just as a directory created via a terminal emulator.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target email subject: '[ILUG] Re: Problems with RAID1 on cobalt raq3'. Recipient: 'tickets@localhost'. Subject prefix: '[TICKET]'. Required body lines: 'Priority: Normal' and 'Tags: triage, bug'. Archive folder name: 'Processed-Tickets'.
